description.p1: We use cookies and similar technologies to make the site work properly, remember your preferences, protect forms against abuse, and understand how the site is used. By clicking "Accept all", you consent to the use of all optional cookies and services. You can also choose to accept only essential cookies or customize your preferences.
description.p2: By using this site, you agree to our <privacyLink>privacy policy</privacyLink> and <cookieLink>cookie policy</cookieLink>.

essential.title: Essential
essential.description: Required for the site to function properly and cannot be turned off.

functional.title: Functional
functional.description: Used to enable helpful site features such as language, theme, and spam protection.

analytics.title: Analytics
analytics.description: Used to understand how visitors use the site so we can improve performance and content.

social.title: Social
social.description: Allows social media integrations and related third-party features.

campaigns.title: Campaigns
campaigns.description: Allows third-party services to measure traffic, engagement, and campaign performance.

cookieConsent.title: Cookie consent storage
cookieConsent.description: Stores your cookie preferences so we can respect your choices.

sessionCookie.title: Session cookie
sessionCookie.description: Maintains essential session and security-related functionality while using the site.

recaptcha.title: reCAPTCHA
recaptcha.description: Helps protect forms and the site against spam, bots, and abuse.

locale.title: Language preference
locale.description: Remembers your selected language on the site.

theme.title: Theme preference
theme.description: Remembers your preferred visual theme, such as light or dark mode.

google.title: Google services
google.description: Allows Google services to provide analytics, embedded content, or campaign-related measurement where enabled.

meta.title: Meta services
meta.description: Allows Meta services to support social integrations or campaign-related measurement where enabled.

youtube.title: YouTube
youtube.description: Allows YouTube content and related measurement features where enabled.
